features.description: List of features available on the server

features-local.description: List of features only available locally (not for federated conversations)

allowed.description: Whether file sharing is allowed in conversations

folder.description: User's attachment folder (only available for logged in users)

supported-reactions.description: List of supported reaction emojis during calls

predefined-backgrounds.description: List of file names relative to the spreed/img/backgrounds/ web path, e.g. `2_home.jpg`

predefined-backgrounds-v2.description: List of file paths relative to the server web root with leading slash, e.g. `/apps/spreed/img/backgrounds/2_home.jpg`

can-upload-background.description: Whether the user can upload custom virtual backgrounds

sip-enabled.description: Whether SIP is enabled on the server

sip-dialout-enabled.description: Whether SIP dial-out is enabled on the server

default-phone-region.description: Default phone region of the server

can-enable-sip.description: Whether the user can enable SIP for conversations

start-without-media.description: Whether calls start without media by default

max-duration.description: Maximum duration of a call in seconds, `0` means unlimited

blur-virtual-background.description: Whether the blur virtual background is available

live-transcription-target-language-id.description: The default target language for live transcription

play-sounds.description: Whether to play sounds for call events

grid-limit.description: Maximum number of participants shown in the grid view

grid-limit-enforced.description: Whether the grid limit is enforced by the server

max-length.description: Maximum length of a chat message

read-privacy.description: Read privacy setting for the user (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#participant-read-status-privacy))

has-translation-task-providers.description: Whether translation task providers are available

typing-privacy.description: Typing privacy setting for the user (see [constants list](https://nextcloud-talk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/constants#participant-typing-privacy))

summary-threshold.description: Minimum number of chat messages before a summary can be generated

can-create.description: Whether the user can create conversations

force-passwords.description: Whether passwords are enforced for public conversations

description-length.description: Maximum length of a conversation description

retention-event.description: Retention period for event conversations in seconds, `0` means no retention

retention-phone.description: Retention period for phone conversations in seconds, `0` means no retention

retention-instant-meetings.description: Retention period for instant meetings in seconds, `0` means no retention

only-trusted-servers.description: Whether only trusted servers are allowed for federation

max-gif-size.description: Maximum GIF file size in bytes for previews

session-ping-limit.description: Maximum number of sessions that can be pinged in a single request

hello-v2-token-key.description: Public key for hello v2 authentication

config-local.description: Map of config keys that are only available locally (not for federated conversations)

post.summary: Sends a new chat message to the given room
post.description: The author and timestamp are automatically set to the current user/guest and time.

referenceId.description: For the message to be able to later identify it again

replyTo.description: Parent id which this message is a reply to

silent.description: If sent silent the chat message will not create any notifications

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

400.description: When the replyTo is invalid or message is empty

post.summary: Adds a reaction to a chat message

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

delete.summary: Deletes a reaction from a chat message

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass
